title: Add JSDoc to all backend class methods
description: PRD §5 requires JSDoc on backend classes. Currently only the StorageBackend interface (types.ts) and AgenticFileSystem public methods have JSDoc. Add JSDoc comments to all public methods on: AgenticStoreBackend, OPFSBackend, NodeFsBackend, MemoryBackend, SQLiteBackend, LocalStorageBackend. Match the quality and format of existing interface docs. Target: PRD §5 gap 'backend class methods lack JSDoc'.
